what_it_does: Defines an outline SVG icon showing a speech bubble containing a question mark.
observations: The SVG uses a 24 by 24 viewBox with no fill and currentColor stroke.
The outer path draws a rounded rectangular chat bubble with a tail.
The inner path draws a question mark and dot using path commands.
Stroke width is 1.5 with round line caps and joins.
standouts: The icon inherits color from the surrounding text or CSS through currentColor.
The image is composed from two path elements: one for the bubble and one for the question mark.
conventions: Follows common outline icon conventions: fill none, currentColor stroke, rounded caps, rounded joins, and a 24 by 24 coordinate system.
Keeps all geometry inline in path data without IDs, classes, gradients, masks, or embedded styling.
concerns: No title or desc element is present, so accessible naming would need to be supplied by the consuming context.
The question mark dot is drawn as a very short vertical segment, making its visibility dependent on stroke rendering.
notes: A compact reusable outline icon for a help, question, or conversational prompt action.
questions: Is accessible labeling intentionally handled outside this raw SVG asset?
Is the 1.5 stroke width part of the intended icon style for this asset set?
purpose_vs_actual: The filename implies a speech-question icon, and the SVG content matches that by drawing a chat bubble with a question mark.
intention_signals: It appears intended to provide a minimal themeable UI icon for help, support, Q&A, or question-related messaging.
contribution: Contributes a reusable currentColor outline asset combining a speech bubble shape with a question mark, suitable for preserving question-oriented conversational affordance in a fused system.
summary_for_embedding: A 24x24 outline SVG icon of a speech bubble containing a question mark, using currentColor stroke and no fill.
intention_for_embedding: This asset was for representing help, questions, support, or conversational inquiry in a themeable icon system.
